proposal_summary: This proposal requests funding for Arbitrum Onboarding V2, a 7-month Governance Bootcamp designed to onboard, train, and match new governance participants (Governance Fellows) with Arbitrum protocols. It includes an educational curriculum, hands-on exercises, and a matching phase.

disclosed_entities.name: Areta
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Areta, Event Horizon, Gains Network, Gitcoin, Tally, Plutus DAO, and Uniswap Foundation are eager to work with a Governance Fellow

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We’re thrilled to welcome Bhaumik Patel, founder of Atrium Academy, as an advisor

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We will be using the MSS services for payment. For swapping ARB to USDC, the MSS will send funds to an Arbitrum Foundation controlled address.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Run V2 of Arbitrum DAO’s Onboarding Program for 7 months
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal requests $193,138 USD paid in ARB for the Onboarding Working Group to run V2 of Arbitrum DAO’s Onboarding Program for 7 months.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Swapped funds sent to Arbitrum Foundation controlled address
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: For swapping ARB to USDC, the MSS will send funds to an Arbitrum Foundation controlled address.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal outlines a comprehensive 7-month educational program involving multiple tracks, exercises, curriculum modifications, and payment processes.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The Onboarding Program consists of the following components: An Application and Interview Process. A Curated Curriculum and Workshops. Exercises to assess comprehension of workshop materials... We are proposing a budget of $193,138 USD ... paid in ARB over 7 months.

limitations: No specific smart contract addresses or target functions are explicitly provided for the transfer.
